bird.name: Puerto Rican lizard cuckoo
bird.summary: The Puerto Rican lizard cuckoo (Coccyzus vieilloti) is a species of bird in the tribe Phaenicophaeini, subfamily Cuculinae of the cuckoo fa…

relations.subject: Puerto Rican lizard cuckoo
relations.evidence: It inhabits a variety of forested landscapes including semi-open woodlands, dense montane forest, dry coastal forest, and swamp forest
relations.object_summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。
